introSection: Atomic (Japanese: アトミックコースター) was a steel shuttle roller coaster previously located at Greenland in Arao, Kumamoto, Japan.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The roller coaster was closed in the 2009 season, with its vertical loop remaining at the park as decoration.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The train engaged the Chain lift hill forwards, traversing the rest of the layout backwards.

sections.title: Colour scheme

fullText:
Atomic (Japanese: アトミックコースター) was a steel shuttle roller coaster previously located at Greenland in Arao, Kumamoto, Japan.

The roller coaster was closed in the 2009 season, with its vertical loop remaining at the park as decoration.

The train engaged the Chain lift hill forwards, traversing the rest of the layout backwards.

Mint track and white supports. The vertical loop features yellow supports.




 * Atomic on the parks website (Japanese)
